description: Modify the Jitsi Meet web configuration at `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js` to support high-fidelity screen sharing by setting the `desktopSharingFrameRate` to a minimum of 15 and a maximum of 30 frames per second and enabling `enableLayerSuspension`. Restart the Jitsi Meet services using docker compose to apply the changes. Verify the system is healthy and create a report at `~/fps_config_report.txt` confirming the changes.
